# Site fixtures

These placeholder HTML files represent the main website shapes Phase 2 needs to parse. Replace them with saved real pages when building a stronger validation set.

- `static.html`: a simple hand-authored site with footer social profiles.
- `wordpress.html`: a WordPress-like page with a `mailto:` link and obfuscated email text.
- `wix.html`: a Wix-like page with platform junk addresses that must be filtered.
- `shopify.html`: a storefront-style page with social post/share URLs mixed with profiles.
- `react-spa.html`: a sparse app shell with contact data in markup that mimics JS-heavy sites.
